rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF MARILYN SILVERMAN-BALLONOFF
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Appearance At Deposition, Deposition Testimony And Deposition Document; Etc.
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel appearance at deposition and document production is granted. Selene Ballonoff shall appear for her deposition no later than April 10, 2015. Ms. Ballonoff shall produce all responsive documents at the deposition. The motion for monetary sanctions is denied without prejudice. The moving party reserves the right to move for additional sanctions, including evidentiary sanctions if Ms. Ballonoff fails to comply with this court's order. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the court's tentative must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 3/30/2015, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EMILA DI FRANCO GLESSI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Petition For Probate Of 1988 Will
rulings.Rulings: Anthony Muschi's demurrer to petition for probate of 1988 Will is overruled. Muschi's demurrer is in effect a statutory plea of abatement. The statutory plea of abatement based on the defense of "another action pending" has been strictly interpreted to defeat pleas in abatement. Muschi cannot show that all three factors for a successful plea can be met. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative shall notify the court and opposing counsel no later than March 30, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
